query: SELECT a.id, a.data, a.horaInicio, a.status, c.nome as cliente FROM agendamentos a JOIN agendamento_itens ai ON ai.agendamentoId = a.id LEFT JOIN clientes c ON c.id = a.clienteId WHERE ai.servicoId = 60003 ORDER BY a.data;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user GGRnjJR18tuCoSZ.76b1f0ca9b9f --database BkCt9rpSQdtCMrvdCmsRG4 --execute SELECT a.id, a.data, a.horaInicio, a.status, c.nome as cliente FROM agendamentos a JOIN agendamento_itens ai ON ai.agendamentoId = a.id LEFT JOIN clientes c ON c.id = a.clienteId WHERE ai.servicoId = 60003 ORDER BY a.data;
